lines.english: The six Shaastras may be read to a fool,
but it is like the wind blowing in the ten directions. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਕਣ ਖਲਹਾਨੁ ਜੈਸੇ ਗਾਹਨ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bin kan khalahaan jaise gaahan paaeaa |
lines.english: It is like threshing a crop without any corn - nothing is gained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਉ ਸਾਕਤ ਤੇ ਕੋ ਨ ਬਰਾਸਾਇਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: tiau saakat te ko na baraasaaeaa |4|
lines.english: In the same way, no benefit comes from the faithless cynic. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਤ ਹੀ ਲਾਗਾ ਜਿਤੁ ਕੋ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: tit hee laagaa jit ko laaeaa |
lines.english: As the Lord attaches them, so are all attached.
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:
He created the soul, the breath of life and the body.
Says Nanak, God has formed such a form. ||5||5||
The Guru, the Lord of the Universe, is the Helper of the soul.
He created all beings, and knows their pains. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਲਤਿ ਪਲਤਿ ਜਾ ਕੀ ਸਦ ਛਾਮ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: halat palat jaa kee sad chhaam |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Here and herafter, He always provides shade. ||1||Pause||
Friends, well-wishers and wealth will not support you.
In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, the love of duality vanishes. ||2||
Worship and adoration of God is the pure way of life.
Except the One Lord, he does not know any other at all. ||4||6||
Nanak utters the Ambrosial Bani of the Lord.
Blessed, blessed is my Lord. ||3||
My Beloved Lord, the Source of Nectar, is in the middle as well. ||1||
The Lord is in front of me, and the Lord is behind me.
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਖ ਸਹਜ ਆਨੰਦ ਗ੍ਰਿਹ ਭਉਣ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sookh sehaj aanand grih bhaun |1| rahaau |
lines.english: In His Home and Mansion, I find peace, poise and bliss. ||1||Pause||
Chanting the Naam, the Name of the Lord, with my tongue, and hearing it with my ears, I live.
God is my Shaastra and my favorable omen.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਅਮਰ ਥਿਰੁ ਥੀਵੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: prabh simar simar amar thir theeve |2|
lines.english: Meditating, meditating in remembrance on God, I have become eternal, permanent and stable. ||2||
The Unstruck Sound-current of the Shabad, the Word of God, vibrates in the Court of the Lord. ||3||
The pains of countless lifetimes have been erased.
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:
Nanak has entered the Sanctuary of God. ||4||7||
Granting His Grace, God has blended me with Himself.
It brings millions of desires to fulfillment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਸਿਮਰੈ ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਗਤਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਪੀਵਤ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਨ ਜੋਨਿ ਭ੍ਰਮਾਮ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jo simarai tis kee gat hovai peevat bahurr na jon bhramaam |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Whoever meditates on it, is saved; drinking it in, the mortal does not wander in reincarnation again. ||1||Pause||
The Naam, the Name of the Lord of the Universe, is the holy water of the Ganges.
On the Path of Death, It will go with you and help you. ||1||
It is my worship, meditation, austerity and cleansing bath.
Meditating in remembrance on the Naam, I have become free of desire. ||2||
Meditating in remembrance on the Naam brings perfect conduct. ||3||
It is my domain and empire, wealth, mansion and court.
Slave Nanak has deliberated, and has come to this conclusion:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਮਿਥਿਆ ਸਭ ਛਾਰੁ ॥੪॥੮॥
lines.translit: bin har naam mithiaa sabh chhaar |4|8|
lines.english: Without the Lord's Name, everything is false and worthless, like ashes. ||4||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੇਪੁ ਨ ਲਾਗੋ ਤਿਲ ਕਾ ਮੂਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: lep na laago til kaa mool |
lines.english: The poison had absolutely no harmful effect.
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:
The sinner died through the Power of the Guru. ||1||Pause||
The Supreme Lord God Himself has saved His humble servant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਸਟੁ ਬ੍ਰਾਹਮਣੁ ਮੂਆ ਹੋਇ ਕੈ ਸੂਲ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: dusatt braahaman mooaa hoe kai sool |1|
lines.english: But the wicked Brahmin died in pain. ||1||
He Himself has destroyed the ignorant sinner. ||2||
The humble servant of the Lord and Master meditates on Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿੰਦਕ ਕਾ ਮਾਥਾ ਈਹਾਂ ਊਹਾ ਕਾਲਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: nindak kaa maathaa eehaan aoohaa kaalaa |3|
lines.english: The face of the slanderer, here and hereafter, is blackened. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮਾਤ ਪਿਤਾ ਅਪਣੇ ਦਾਸ ਕਾ ਰਖਵਾਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: prabh maat pitaa apane daas kaa rakhavaalaa |
lines.english: God is the Mother, the Father and the Protector of His slave.
The filthy sinner lost hope and died. ||4||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਕੀ ਪਰਮੇਸਰਿ ਸੁਣੀ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: jan naanak kee paramesar sunee aradaas |
lines.english: The Transcendent Lord has heard the prayer of servant Nanak.
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:
The glorious vision of Your slaves, O Infinite Lord, is wonderful and beauteous.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੂਬੁ ਖੂਬੁ ਖੂਬੁ ਖੂਬੁ ਖੂਬੁ ਤੇਰੋ ਨਾਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: khoob khoob khoob khoob khoob tero naam |
lines.english: Excellent, excellent, excellent, excellent, excellent is Your Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਝੂਠੁ ਝੂਠੁ ਝੂਠੁ ਝੂਠੁ ਦੁਨੀ ਗੁਮਾਨੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jhootth jhootth jhootth jhootth dunee gumaan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: False, false, false, false is pride in the world. ||1||Pause||
